name: RAINBOW CLEAN TEXT
source: V2 50 TITLES PACK PR/Manual files/RAINBOW CLEAN TEXT.mogrt
knownDefects: The AEP report names AVANTE, but this pass uses Mytupi-Bold because it better matches the rounded lowercase preview at 640x360.
AE CC Burn Film, Venetian Blinds, Turbulent Displace, Wave Warp, and CC Light Sweep remain procedural approximations.
Text scale, wave echo anchors, and the shared hue phase are tuned to the original preview samples rather than the earlier second-wave offset stack.
Dash layers remain cleaner and more regular than the source's organic AE turbulence.
